title: Fix MobileNav never rendering (hiddenPaths includes '/')
description:
MobileNav.tsx returns null on every page because hiddenPaths.some(p => location.pathname.startsWith(p)) has '/' in hiddenPaths. Every path startsWith('/'), so the bottom mobile nav has never rendered since it shipped in commit fc688e5 ('feat: next-gen design system and documentation overhaul (#94)', ~2025-12-02). ~4.5 months of no mobile nav.

User symptom: on mobile, Settings button is unreachable from the bottom nav. Workaround: desktop Header's icon-only Bell/Settings is still technically visible at mobile widths but tiny and unlabeled.

Scope: standalone fix, not bundled with custom-connectors PR #219. Pre-existing bug, not a regression.
acceptance_criteria:
- MobileNav renders on /dashboard, /tasks/:id, /settings/notifications, /admin, /explore on mobile viewports
- MobileNav still hidden on /, /sign-in, /sign-up, /waitlist, /changelog
- Manual mobile viewport check (Playwright or DevTools device emulation)
- No regressions on desktop (MobileNav should already be display:none via responsive CSS)
notes:
File: frontend/src/components/MobileNav.tsx
Introduced: fc688e5 (#94, ~2025-12-02)
Fix proposed by: torale.feat-custom-connectors-2 peer
Tags: mobile, nav, frontend
